creator: adamw@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to William Grzybowski from comment #3)
> I don't like the idea of patches named patch-[ab]. They are non-descriptive.
> Any chance you can describe the file being changed or group all of them in
> the same functionality patch?

Yeah, absolutely not. I went through contortions to get all the patch-ab nonsense out of the ports tree. Saito, can you please update the patch with properly named patches?
